# TS9702

**Category:** Import Resolution · **Severity:** Warning

## Message

```
Operator `{operator}` on {type} is not rewritten in explicit mode
```

## Explanation

In explicit resolution mode, operators are only rewritten when
the typeclass is explicitly imported and used.

To enable automatic rewriting:
1. Import the typeclass: import { Eq } from "@typesugar/std"
2. Or switch to automatic mode in typesugar.config.json

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
